patch.value: pm claim --if-available (skip when held) — reduce 533 ownership_conflict events

Telemetry: ownership_conflict fires 533 times in 30 days. Agents commonly want "claim if free, otherwise move on".

Proposed flag: `--if-available` for pm claim. When set, claim returns ok:true with `{claimed: false, held_by: <agent>, expires_at: ...}` instead of erroring on conflict. The current --force flag remains for steal semantics.

Acceptance: tests cover claim/skip/steal trichotomy; MCP pm_claim documented with the new flag.

Implemented pm-d4bo: pm claim --if-available flag skips silently with skipped:true when item is held by another author. Also added claim_takeover:<prev>-><new> warning on default (non-flag) takeovers. Tests added. Targets 533 ownership_conflict events/30d.

author: codex-agent
